main.description: A wrapper record stored in a community's repo that references external content (e.g. a standard.site document) shared by a member. Deleting this record removes the content from the community.

type.description: The kind of content being shared

documentCid.description: CID of the source record at time of sharing, for version pinning

sharedBy.description: DID of the member who shared the content

title.description: Cached title from the source record for display without re-fetching

path.description: Cached URL path from the source record

sharedAt.description: When the content was shared with the community

startsAt.description: Cached event start time (only present when type=event)

endsAt.description: Cached event end time (only present when type=event)

location.description: Cached event location string (only present when type=event)

mode.description: Cached event mode (only present when type=event)
